title: Tender Nostalgic Japanese Garlic Stir-fry
description: A mediterranean-friendly garlic powder infused dish that combines tender vegetables and a hint of umami from fermented products for a nostalgic twist.
instructions: Combine broccoli, carrots, garlic powder, fermented black beans (if using), sesame oil, salt, and pepper in a large bowl. Mix well to evenly distribute the ingredients.
Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable broth or water in a wok or skillet over medium-high heat until simmering.

Add the mixed vegetables from the bowl into the hot broth/water mixture and stir-fry for about 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are crisp-tender but still retain their color and shape.
Remove from heat and add scallions if using. Stir gently to combine all ingredients.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
